2122680.name: Duct Tape Simulator
2122680.description:
Duct tape - it is the first thing that comes to mind when something breaks.
First aid, reliable assistant. This is what you will be playing in the Duct Tape Simulator! Fix what's broken, strengthen what's fragile. and remember - If you can’t repair something with duct tape, then you need more duct tape!

Gameplay
In this game you act as duct tape and you have to fix cracked and broken things.
Search the room for damaged items and repair them to fill up the integrity bar.
Improve your performance and unlock new types of sticky tape.
2122680.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
